'''UR-1''' was a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] similar to [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] in voice and vocabulary.

He helped the [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] [[Nerf herder/Legends|nerf herder]] [[Domo Jones]], the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] waitress [[JillJoo Jab]], and the [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] musician [[Blerx Tango|Blerx]] sabotage an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] purchase of [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]].

{{Droid-stub}}
